hero.description: We are a digital studio building high-quality web products, thoughtful interfaces, and custom software solutions.

webDev.title: Web Development
webDev.description: Fast, scalable, and beautifully engineered web applications. We build with modern frameworks to deliver experiences that perform.

productDesign.title: Product Design
productDesign.description: Design rooted in usability and refined aesthetics. From wireframes to polished interfaces, we shape products people love to use.

softwareSolutions.title: Software Solutions
softwareSolutions.description: Custom software tailored to your business needs. From internal tools to complex platforms, we build solutions that scale with you.

projects.label: Selected work
projects.description: A selection of recent work across web development, design, and digital experiences.

guia.description: A food guide celebrating Dominican cuisine — restaurants, recipes, and the stories behind every dish.

learn.description: Informational website for an e-learning platform — clean, accessible, and designed to communicate value from the first scroll.

neuro.description: A clean, conversion-focused store for playful and educational products — no clutter, just what matters.

photoscape.description: A landscaping portfolio where the images do the talking — minimal, spacious, and fully immersive.

m4life.description: Website for a startup bringing innovative microbiological solutions to market.

about.label: About us
about.headline: Who we are.
about.paragraph1: ATBA Studio is a digital studio specializing in web development, product design, and custom software solutions. We partner with founders, startups, and growing businesses to bring their ideas to life with precision and purpose.
about.paragraph2: We are a small team, which means you get our full attention on every project. No account managers, no handoffs. Just direct collaboration from start to finish.
about.pillar1Description: We take on a limited number of projects at a time to give each one the attention it deserves.
about.pillar2Description: From design to deployment, we handle the full lifecycle of your product.
about.pillar3Description: We build with clean code and scalable architecture so your product grows with you.

process.label: How we work
process.step1Description: We start by understanding your goals, audience, and context. Through focused conversations and research, we map out what success looks like for your project.
process.step2Description: We define the scope, architecture, and design direction. Wireframes and design systems take shape before a single line of code is written.
process.step3Description: We develop with precision and speed. You're involved throughout — regular reviews, live previews, and clear communication keep everything on track.
process.step4Description: We handle deployment, performance tuning, and go-live. Post-launch, we stay close to help you iterate and grow as your product evolves.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Send us a message and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

footer.tagline: A modern digital studio building high-quality web experiences and digital products.
